extract: Froslass (Japanese: ユキメノコ Yukimenoko) is a dual-type Ice/Ghost Pokémon introduced in Generation IV. It evolves from a female Snorunt when exposed to a Dawn Stone. It is one of Snorunt's final forms, the other being Glalie. Froslass can Mega Evolve into Mega Froslass using the Froslassite. Mega Froslass was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
